reviews.name: accounts/1/locations/1/reviews/4
reviews.comment: Quoted one price at the desk and billed my insurance for something else. Still untangling it a month later.

reviewReply.comment: We apologize for the billing confusion. Our manager has reached out to help resolve the insurance claim.
reviewReply.policyViolation: Reply removed for policy violation: contains personal health information.

reviews.name: accounts/1/locations/1/reviews/9
reviews.comment: They took my kids (4 and 7) for their first checkups — patient, funny, zero tears. We found our family dentist.

reviews.name: accounts/1/locations/1/reviews/11
reviews.comment: The work itself was solid. Parking downtown is a pain, plan extra time.

reviews.name: accounts/1/locations/1/reviews/15
reviews.comment: Cleaning was fine, but I waited about 25 minutes past my appointment time.

reviewReply.comment: We apologize for the billing confusion. Our manager has reached out to help resolve the insurance claim.

reviews.name: accounts/1/locations/1/reviews/6
reviews.comment: Best cleaning I've ever had. The hygienist was gentle and explained everything as she went.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you! Making nervous patients comfortable is exactly what we aim for.

reviews.name: accounts/1/locations/1/reviews/3
reviews.comment: The whole team remembered my name on the second visit. Little things like that matter.

reviewReply.comment: We're so glad you had a great visit! Thanks for trusting us with your smile.

reviews.name: accounts/1/locations/1/reviews/12
reviews.comment: The whole team remembered my name on the second visit. Little things like that matter.

reviews.name: accounts/1/locations/1/reviews/2
reviews.comment: Painless root canal. Never thought I'd type those words. Edit: adding a star since they fixed the billing mix-up quickly.

reviews.name: accounts/1/locations/1/reviews/8
reviews.comment: Dr. Patel fixed my chipped front tooth in one visit and it looks perfect. Couldn't be happier.
